description: Following an outage, the system needs to dispatch the nearest available crew to the fault location.

nodes.task_description: Get the confirmed fault location from the FLISR system.

expected_outcome.value: System has the GPS coordinates of the needed repair.

nodes.task_description: Query the mobile workforce management system for the real-time location and status of all field crews.

expected_outcome.value: System gets the location and availability of all crews.

nodes.task_description: Identify the closest available crew and dispatch them to the fault location with all relevant outage details.

expected_outcome.value: System sends a work order to the optimal crew's mobile device.
